content.rendered:
How It Started

Like many of our projects, this one began with clarity in mind. Bizclusive, a new kind of marketing agency built for beginners, creators, and side hustlers, had the offers and the vision — but their website wasn’t pulling its weight. No funnel. No interactive tools. And no way to communicate their signature “zero to hero” system.

We kicked things off with our SmartForm™ onboarding flow, followed by a strategy deep-dive. From there, our team handled everything: website redesign, funnel optimization, SEO, Google profile setup, and interactive tools — all aimed at turning their site into a high-performing sales engine.

Project Overview

Bizclusive serves a unique audience:

  • New agency owners looking for branding + systems
  • Freelancers ready to scale
  • Creators looking to monetize their services

But their digital presence was scattered across multiple platforms with no centralized message. Our goal was to consolidate their offers, clarify their funnel, and build a premium web presence that functioned like a 24/7 salesperson.

We drew inspiration from ClickFunnels-style funnels and Notion-style minimalism, then added our Local Social spin to keep things bold, modern, and easy to navigate.

Initial Website Mockup

Phase 1: Website Redesign

  • Built on WordPress + Elementor for full scalability
  • Created a clean homepage with instant funnel previews
  • Added SmartForm™ with cost calculator logic to guide prospects
  • Designed a “Hero Packages” section with clear value stacks
  • Added sticky CTAs, responsive layouts, and a product-recommendation quiz
  • Refined site copy for clarity and conversion

Phase 2: Google Business SEO

  • Helped Bizclusive claim and optimize their Google Business Profile
  • Submitted to startup + agency directories for backlinks and authority
  • Integrated local keyword targeting (e.g., “marketing systems for beginner agencies,” “zero to hero agency funnel”)
  • Ensured NAP consistency across platforms

Phase 3: On-Page SEO & Optimization

  • Used RankMath Pro for SEO audits and enhancements
  • Added JSON schema for pricing and reviews
  • Compressed images + enabled lazy loading for faster site speed
  • Uploaded optimized alt text, submitted sitemap, and connected to GSC

Key Wins

  • Website form submissions up 4x within the first 30 days post-launch
  • Average session duration increased 2.3x, showing stronger visitor engagement
  • Achieved an SEO health score of 85+ with full on-page optimization
  • Improved keyword visibility for long-tail terms like “zero to hero agency funnel” and “affordable marketing setup for freelancers”
  • Centralized multiple scattered offers into one high-converting funnel
  • Positioned Bizclusive as a premium yet beginner-friendly solution for agencies and creators

Next Steps

We’re now supporting Bizclusive with launch content creation, Meta Ads retargeting, and email automation drips to nurture new members and keep funnel activity consistent.

Final CTA

We specialize in helping agencies and service providers like Bizclusive build funnels that work while they sleep.
👉 Want results like these for your business? Let’s talk.

excerpt.rendered: We transformed Bizclusive’s site into a sleek, conversion-driven storefront by focusing on clean design, simple navigation, and trust-building details. The result: a modern site that looks great and turns visitors into customers.
